full_description: WalkPal is a walking companion app that helps users track their daily steps and distance. It provides a fun and motivational way to stay active. With WalkPal, you can set goals and challenges for yourself, track your progress, and compete with friends to stay motivated. The app also includes features such as step tracking, distance tracking, and calorie burn tracking. Whether you're looking to improve your overall health or just want to stay active, WalkPal is the perfect companion for your walking journey.
